outsider.quote: The mirror does not lie; it only reveals the parts of the system we agreed to forget.
observations: Symmetry persists in the architecture's demand for synchronization.
The ghost of a missing user provides the purest form of agency.
Information flows like ink through a sieve—some held, most lost to the noise.
outsider.insight: True stability is found not in the absence of flux, but in the precision of the transition.
